title: We Have Minecraft at Home
description: An extremely cursed version of the game
body:
## Do you want all your mobs to be normal? Of course not!
![A field of chicken-cow things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/109e6f08dd906da9def14011e265e7a7d8bdba3c.png)
## Tools made of string? Yes please!

## A musket? Sure, why not!

And a bunch of other random, cursed and outright insane crap just happening constantly. Honestly I don't even remember half of the stuff that's here, all I know is that the game is completely broken and borked every step of the way.

 

This is horrible, logs will be filled, games will be crashed, graphics cards will burn and headaces will be had.

Please do not download this. /s


## Credits
[Distant Friends](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/distant-friends)
